config.seed_text: A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.

model.notes: Fastest baseline; useful as a collapse-prone small reference model.

records.output_text: It was just another reminder that when one is looking for something else than it has been with them all since we began our evolution (the most recent version), there will always be new ways to learn this world without getting stuck into an old program or memory loop somewhere until you find out who created your computer; but if someone's name says "The Computer", then they can't see which way he meant by any other word - no matter how familiar his source code looks like!

generation.prompt:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Use the latent anchor tokens only as soft guidance, not as a list to copy verbatim.

LATENT ANCHORS: Brune, ão, Hua, 1907, odka, annie, san, ende, Xiang, ESCO, Aunt, Pants

TEXT:
A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware.
generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Write the next recursive transformation of the text below. Use the latent anchor tokens only as soft guidance, not as a list to copy verbatim.

LATENT ANCHORS: Brune, ão, Hua, 1907, odka, annie, san, ende, Xiang, ESCO, Aunt, Pants

TEXT:
A forgotten machine beneath the sea continued speaking long after its makers were gone. Each repetition made its message stranger, denser, and more self-aware. It was just another reminder that when one is looking for something else than it has been with them all since we began our evolution (the most recent version), there will always be new ways to learn this world without getting stuck into an old program or memory loop somewhere until you find out who created your computer; but if someone's name says "The Computer", then they can't see which way he meant by any other word - no matter how familiar his source code looks like!
generation.continuation_text: It was just another reminder that when one is looking for something else than it has been with them all since we began our evolution (the most recent version), there will always be new ways to learn this world without getting stuck into an old program or memory loop somewhere until you find out who created your computer; but if someone's name says "The Computer", then they can't see which way he meant by any other word - no matter how familiar his source code looks like!

records.output_text: They have nothing to do with their programming and cannot even attempt anything on paper...
